arts.ttl: Arsenal squad v Man United revealed as Mikel Arteta faces key Raheem Sterling selection decision
arts.sum: The winger on loan from Chelsea returned to the matchday squad for the first time since the League Cup quarter-final when the Gunners played their first leg in the next round of that competition versus Newcastle United . Gabriel Martinelli and Leandro Trossard have yet failed to take their chances to deputise for Saka, so Arteta could turn to Sterling when Man United visit north London for the second time in five-and-a-half weeks.

arts.ttl: Napoli 'lining up move for Man United winger Alejandro Garnacho to replace PSG-bound Khvicha Kvaratskhelia' - as 'Red Devils set their asking price'
arts.sum: Garnacho has been benched for the last five matches and was dropped entirely for United's victory over Manchester City, alongside wantaway Marcus Rashford.

arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling drops early Arsenal team news hint amid Mikel Arteta's Martin Odegaard issue
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling has dropped a team news hint ahead of Arsenal's clash against Manchester United . With that being said, Arteta will be hoping Odegaard, with help from Sterling and Jorginho, can lead Arsenal to victory.

arts.ttl: David Ornstein: Arsenal Would 'Really Like to Sign' £50m Star 'Arteta Loves'
arts.sum: David Ornstein claims Mikel Arteta wants one of Europe's most exciting talents.

arts.ttl: FA Cup fourth round draw LIVE: Liverpool, Chelsea, Man City learn opponents after Arsenal vs Man Utd clash
arts.sum: The draw for the fourth round takes place, with fixtures to be played on the weekend of 8 February

arts.ttl: Leny Yoro drops early Manchester United team news hints as Ruben Amorim gives Amad injury update
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim will be keen to mark his debut season as Manchester United head coach with a piece of silverware

arts.ttl: Five of the best cup clashes between Arsenal and Man United
arts.sum: Arsenal host Manchester United in the FA Cup’s third round today, a fixture steeped in history and rivalry. The two most successful sides in the competition’s history collide at the Emirates, in an early round encounter between two of English football’s giants. Ahead of their meeting in North London, we’ve looked back on some memorable […] The post Five of the best cup clashes between Arsenal and Man United first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Most valuable Arsenal & Man United combined XI in history
arts.sum: Arsenal and Manchester United remain one of the biggest rivalries in England given the history and achievements of both clubs. For almost a decade, Arsenal and Manchester United battled...

arts.ttl: From Arsenal's blossoming superstar Ethan Nwaneri to Theo Walcott and Harvey Elliott... the YOUNGEST players in history to represent each Premier League club - and where they are now
arts.sum: There is nothing more exciting for fans than having a fresh young talent break through the ranks as a teenager at their football club - just ask Arsenal supporters about Ethan Nwaneri.

arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Manchester United live early team news, kick-off time and how to watch information
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, George Smith)
arts.sum: Live updates from the Emirates Stadium as Man United face Arsenal in the third round of the FA Cup on Sunday afternoon.
